← Sounds

Where each language stands

Sounds · Book One

The opening is readable in all 114 languages today. 4 complete editions can be downloaded now; the rest are translated in full and working their way through review. This page is generated from the book’s own files, so it is current.

Ready to read The complete book, free to download. 4
In final review Translated in full; being checked before release. 6
Translated A full draft exists; review still to come. 94
Being revised Parts of this edition need reworking before it can be trusted. 10
Every language edition of Sounds, Book One, with its current state and available files

Editions are released as they pass review, not on a schedule. Follow on Telegram to hear when new ones arrive.
